notes: Taraweeh Jamaat times vary — see timetable. There will be a second Taraweeh Jamaat at 12:30am. To protect your fast, please stop eating 5 minutes before Sehri End time. Maghrib/Iftar column is labelled 'Maghrib Iftar' under Jama'at Times — this is the Iftar time. No separate Maghrib Jama'at column exists.
